title: Projects
text: This page highlights my communication, marketing, and multimedia projects that demonstrate my skills in storytelling, presentation design, audience analysis, and strategic communication.

title: Projects
text:
AAA Baseball Team Branding Project
Overview
For a sports communication course, my team created a fictional AAA baseball organization. We developed the team’s brand identity, target audience, promotional strategy, and visual marketing materials before presenting our proposal in Canva.
Skills Demonstrated

Brand development
Sports marketing
Audience analysis

title: Projects
section: Marketing Initiative for Bay Law Injury Attorneys
text:
Marketing Initiative for Bay Law Injury Attorneys

Overview
As part of a marketing strategy course, my team conducted a marketing analysis for Bay Law Injury Attorneys, a personal injury law firm serving the Henderson and Las Vegas area. We evaluated the firm’s current marketing efforts, identified strengths and opportunities for improvement, and developed a year-long promotional strategy designed to increase brand awareness, customer engagement, and lead generation.


My Contributions
For this project, I was responsible for developing the Promotional Strategy section of the presentation. My work included researching digital and traditional marketing tactics, recommending social media and SEO initiatives, and creating a phased implementation plan to support long-term business growth.


Skills Demonstrated

Marketing Strategy
Promotional Planning
Digital Marketing
SEO & PPC Strategy
Social Media Marketing
Audience Analysis
Business Communication
Team Collaboration
Professional Presentation Design



Full Presentation

title: Projects
text:
Multimedia Journalism Story: CPP IBW
Overview:
For a multimedia journalism project, I worked with a partner to create a story about CPP’s Innovation Brew Works restaurant. The final report included written storytelling, photography, and multimedia elements.
Skills Demonstrated:
- Multimedia journalism - Written reporting - Visual storytelling - Video production - Photography - Collaboration

title: Lola Hertsenberg
text:
About Me
Hi! I am a Cal Poly Pomona student interested in marketing analytics and media in the sports and entertainment industries. This portfolio showcases projects that demonstrate my skills in strategic marketing, data analysis, multimedia storytelling, and professional communication.
